player_notes.brandon ingram: Ruled out with right heel inflammation; availability for Game 7 vs. Cavaliers is uncertain — monitor status closely before betting Raptors props.
player_notes.rj barrett: Hit the game-winning 3 in OT in Game 6; high-confidence role as primary scorer/closer in Game 7 vs. Cavaliers with Ingram potentially out.

game_notes.TOR vs CLE: Brandon Ingram (heel inflammation) is questionable/likely out for Game 7, significantly elevating Barrett's usage and boosting props for other Raptors role players.
game_notes.ORL vs DET: Franz Wagner ruled out again (right calf strain) for Game 7 vs. Pistons; Orlando's offensive ceiling limited without him.
